title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people washing a car. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A man and two children are washing a car outside their house. One child is using a sponge and the other is holding a bucket of water. The car is covered in soap and everyone looks happy.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people having a picnic. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Four friends are having a picnic in a park. They are sitting on a blanket and sharing sandwiches and fruit. There is a basket, bottles of water, green grass and trees around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
